76391.subject: Cutting Through CLARITY
76391.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

———————————————————————————

Hi everyone. Markets took a breather yesterday as optimism around the CLARITY Act cooled following the release of updated Senate bill text. While crypto equities gave back part of their recent gains, ETF inflows continued to build, extending their strongest streak since May. Below, we separate headlines from substance, unpack what actually changed in the latest CLARITY draft, and explain which parts matter most for crypto markets.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Wednesday's session traded mixed, with BTC and equity indices trading slightly lower and giving back gains from earlier in the week. While the odds of the CLARITY Act passing moved from 31% to 51% during Tuesday’s session, and crypto equities like COIN and CRCL rallied double digits on the back of this, those odds have since dropped back down to 38%, dragging crypto equities and other indices down with them. 

Senate Republicans released updated bill text on Wednesday codifying the ethics provisions, and the market may now be pricing actual votes on this language rather than just headlines. The volatility in these crypto equities shows that this sector may have the most to gain from bringing this bill over the finish line, the status of which we discuss later. Equity futures traded lower overnight with the Nasdaq opening down -0.97%, bringing crypto majors down modestly into Thursday’s open.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/69037cbd-431a-4c56-816a-a07c04b137f7/image.png?t=1784811363)
Caption: 

The brief spike in CLARITY odds brought most of crypto up with it. Should momentum continue to build and the odds move upward, we should expect this legislation to be a tide that lifts all boats. Going from high uncertainty to low uncertainty is bullish, regardless of how hardline the rulemaking may be. Supporting prices even more, the ETFs are on their longest stretch of consecutive inflows since the beginning of May, and have attracted $750M in net inflows over the past five days. 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/dd26b872-88a9-4587-83e3-21706b34ad3d/image.png?t=1784811363)
Caption: 

— [Luke](https://x.com/0xMether)

———————————————————————————

# Cutting through the CLARITY noise

Trump broke the CLARITY Act's summer stall this week, and the core fight over enforcement remains open. A White House official [

76324.subject: RE: Wedding photo+video
76324.body:
Dear Oleg,

There is no obstacle to photography.
The castle is also open on Sunday.
The fee for photography is 45,000 HUF
You will find all the important information in the attachment.
I will send it in English and Slovak.

I have registered you, you can pay on site

Best regards,


From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 11:51 AM
To: Füzérradvány Helyszín <fuzerradvanyikastely@nof.hu>
Subject: Wedding photo+video

Good day,

I would like to reserve a wedding photo session on 26 July 2026, from 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM, for 5 people.

We would like the photo session to take place inside the castle as well as outside in the castle park.

Thank you, and I look forward to your confirmation.

76254.body:
Dobrý deň prajem
Váš svadobný deň u Nás sa Vám blíži preto ak na mňa mate akekoľvek 
otázky, som tu pre Vás.
Zároveň sa chcem opýtat,kedy vám  v sobotu vyhovuje stretnutie u nás aby 
sme si prešli posledné detaily,ukázala vam sklady a priestory kde si 
môžte zložiť veci. Hosti budete mat nakoniec 47 dospelých,bez deti?  
Verím, že všetko bude podľa vašich predstav.Tešime sa na Vás.

S pozdravom Veronika Koordinatorka

-- 

Veronika Hricová

Koordinátor na svadbe
